one_liner: Xero offers a broad REST accounting/finance API secured via OAuth2 (authorization code or client-credentials Custom Connections), with a free self-serve developer Starter tier, official multi-language SDKs, and an existing official MCP server, making it buildable now for agent toolkits.

auth_methods.notes: Standard authorization code flow for user-delegated access; also supports OAuth2 client credentials grant via 'Custom Connections' for single-org machine-to-machine access. Access tokens are bearer tokens expiring in 30 minutes, refreshable via refresh tokens.

self_serve_notes: Free Starter developer tier available with no monthly fee, up to 5 connections, full access to docs/SDKs/demo company. Moving beyond Starter tier (more connections/features) requires adding a credit card.

api_surface.notes: Xero Accounting API plus additional APIs (Payroll, Files, Assets, Projects, Identity) with official OpenAPI specs and SDKs in Python, Ruby, Node, Java, .NET

evidence.supports: Free Starter tier for developers with no monthly fee, up to 5 connections
OAuth2 auth flows, bearer AccessToken, RefreshToken schema, Connections endpoints
Official Python SDK exists for Xero API
Details on pricing tiers and credit card requirement beyond Starter tier
